name: Webhooks Server

releases.author: khabaroff
releases.description: Plugin ID updated to webhooks-server for Obsidian marketplace compliance.

releases.author: khabaroff
releases.description:
## 🎉 Obsidian Webhooks v2.0.0

Self-hosted webhook delivery system for Obsidian with real-time SSE and exactly-once delivery guarantee.

### ✨ Features
- 📨 Receive webhooks from any external service (IFTTT, Zapier, Make, custom)
- 🔄 Real-time delivery via Server-Sent Events (SSE)
- ✅ Exactly-once delivery guarantee with ACK system
- 🔐 Email authentication with magic links (Mailgun)
- 📊 PostHog analytics integration (optional)
- 🐳 Docker-ready deployment
- 🗄️ PostgreSQL + AES-256-GCM encryption at rest
- 📧 MailerLite integration (optional)

### 📦 Installation

**Option 1: Manual Install**
1. Download `obsidian-webhooks.zip`
2. Extract to your Obsidian plugins folder: `.obsidian/plugins/obsidian-webhooks/`
3. Enable the plugin in Obsidian settings

**Option 2: BRAT (Beta Reviewers Auto-update Tester)**
Add repository: `khabaroff-studio/obsidian-webhooks-server`

### 🚀 Quick Start
1. Deploy the server (Docker recommended, Supabase ready)
2. Register account at your server URL
3. Configure plugin with server URL and client key
4. Start receiving webhooks in Obsidian!

### 📖 Documentation
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/khabaroff-studio/obsidian-webhooks-server)
- [Deployment Guide](https://github.com/khabaroff-studio/obsidian-webhooks-server/blob/main/docs/DEPLOYMENT.md)
- [Live Demo](https://obsidian-webhooks.khabaroff.studio)

### 🛠️ Tech Stack
Go 1.24, PostgreSQL, Docker, Supabase, Gin, Tailwind CSS

### 📝 Testing
72 tests across 10 files with full coverage

---

💡 **Need help?** Open an issue or check the documentation.
releases.name: v2.0.0 - Self-hosted Webhooks for Obsidian
